chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4283 of 2022 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 25.08.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ------------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is over three years ago. It was last taken up on 14.11.2024 when learned counsel for the petitioner was put on notice to satisfy this Court with regard to maintainability of this petition. Today, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that petitioner has lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
